creator: edwin@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Hello, 

As you said, you might not remember having installed 
security/freebsd-update, but that is where the one in /usr/local/bin 
is coming from. 

As from somewhere early in RELENG_6, it has become part of the base 
system and the port can be removed. Just use "pkg_delete 
/var/db/pkg/freebsd-update*/" and it all will be cleaned up. 

Edwin
